title: Backstage Silhouettes
description: Portraits made in the few minutes before a performance, when posture and nerves say more than words.

photos.title: Curtain Line
photos.alt: A stylized portrait placeholder showing a figure in silhouette near stage curtains.
photos.caption: The room is nearly dark, but the edge light keeps the subject present.

photos.title: Hands Before Call
photos.alt: A stylized portrait placeholder emphasizing a performer's hands and backstage shadows.
photos.caption: The smallest motion often tells the whole story before a person steps on stage.
